title: Environment
description: The persisted form of a deployment environment (design §7.7): a first-class, governed, reach-scoped resource a workflow version is made available in and whose source credentials form a per-environment set. An environment is governed exactly like a workflow — it carries an administrator set (stored separately) and an audit trail, and creating one grants the creator administration. Backends store this document verbatim.

name.description: The environment's stable name and identity (e.g. production, staging, DEV-MWA-1). Operator-chosen and immutable; credentials and runs key on it.

displayName.description: An optional human-friendly display name; defaults to the name when absent. Mutable.

managementTags.description: The security tags (KVP labels) scoping who may MANAGE and SEE this environment (§14.2) — e.g. tenant=acme. Immutable: set at create (the deployment stamps the creator's internal tenant tag), carried forward unchanged on update. Management reads/writes are reach-filtered by these via the caller's AccessContext. Absent on an unscoped environment.

createdBy.description: The actor that created the environment.

lastUpdatedBy.description: The actor that last updated the environment, if any.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the environment was last updated, if ever.

SecurityTagInfo.title: SecurityTagInfo
SecurityTagInfo.description: A security label (KVP) scoping the environment for row authorization (§14.2).
